articles.title: Idolises Ronaldo, plays like Saka - meet  £40m Chelsea winger Quenda
articles.summary: Chelsea's new signing Geovany Quenda hopes to follow in the footsteps of Cristiano Ronaldo by leaving Sporting's academy for the challenge and exposure of the Premier League.

articles.title: Scotland goalkeeper Gunn signs for San Jose Earthquakes
articles.summary: Scotland goalkeeper Angus Gunn signs for San Jose Earthquakes after being released by Nottingham Forest.

articles.title: Portugal confirm departure of coach Martinez
articles.summary: The Portuguese football federation confirm the departure of national team coach Roberto Martinez, while Rafael Marquez replaces Javier Aguirre as Mexico coach.

articles.title: England players granted day off after Mexico win
articles.summary: England manager Thomas Tuchel gave his players permission for an offsite family day on Tuesday as the squad recharged after their euphoric win over Mexico.

articles.title: Leeds sign free agent Wilson after Fulham exit
articles.summary: Leeds have completed a deal to sign Harry Wilson on a free transfer following his departure from Fulham.

articles.title: Messi rescues Argentina with equaliser against Egypt
articles.summary: Lionel Messi scores a late equaliser for Argentina against Egypt to level the game at 2-2 during their match in Atlanta.

articles.title: Belgium make light work of US to set up quarter-final tie with Spain
articles.summary: Belgium ease past a defensively sloppy USA in a match shrouded in controversy surrounding Folarin Balogun's delayed suspension, a scandal that made little impact on the pitch.

articles.title: 'Total calamity!' US gift Belgium a third goal
articles.summary: USA goalkeeper Matt Freese with a huge error in judgement as he gifts Belgium's Hans Vanaken the ball, leaving him with an easy finish that defender Tim Ream could've done more to stop. Errors all aro...

articles.title: Bellingham scores two in 98 seconds to silence the Azteca
articles.summary: Jude Bellingham scores two goals in 98 seconds to give England a 2-0 lead over Mexico during their last 16 match at the Mexico City Stadium.

articles.summary: Sean Jansen will win his first cap in a much-changed Ireland side for Saturday's Nations Championship clash with Japan in Australia.

articles.summary: Leeds confirm the signing attacking midfielder Harry Wilson on a four-year deal.

articles.title: VAR controversially rules out Egypt goal
articles.summary: Mostafa Zico has his goal for Egypt ruled out following a VAR review, for a foul on Lisandro Martinez in the build up, during their World Cup last 16 match in Atlanta.

articles.title: Fernandez header seals dramatic Argentina comeback
articles.summary: Enzo Fernandez scores late to give Argentina the lead against Egypt in their last 16 match at the 2026 World Cup.
